name: Safety Department
details: Oversees safety compliance, hazard audits, and PPE rules across plant zones.

name: Security Department
details: Manages gate entry passes, vehicle registrations, and parameter control.

name: Medical Department
details: Main Plant Medical post, runs occupational health clinic and ambulance service.

name: Maintenance Department
details: Handles structural repairs, machinery breakdown assistance, and electrical isolation.

name: Production Department
details: Monitors Blast Furnace operations, coke ovens, and raw material handling schedules.
